parameters.subject: Thank you for referring {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}}
parameters.text:
Dear Dr. {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["referringDoctorName"]}},

Thank you for referring {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}} to my practice. I wanted to let you know that they have successfully booked their initial consultation for {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["appointmentDate"]}}.

I will keep you updated on their diagnosis and treatment plan after their visit.

Thank you again for entrusting me with the neurological care of your patient. I value our ongoing professional relationship.

Warm regards,

Dr. Sayuj
Consultant Neurosurgeon
parameters.html:
Thank you for your referral!

Dear Dr. {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["referringDoctorName"]}},

Thank you for referring {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}} to my practice. I wanted to let you know that they have successfully booked their initial consultation for {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["appointmentDate"]}}.

I will provide a full clinical update on their diagnosis and treatment plan following their evaluation.

Thank you again for entrusting me with the neurological care of your patient. I deeply value our ongoing professional relationship.

Warm regards,

Dr. Sayuj
Consultant Neurosurgeon
